segments.speaker: 讲话人17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm excited our universities merging with Clark University. there will be more classes to choose from and even some new degree programs. I've heard they're thinking about eliminating some majors that only have a small number of students. And right now, we only have ten students in my program. I wasn't aware of that. Hopefully get rid of yours. Yeah. If they do, I'll have to think about transferring elsewhere to finish my degree.
